aciklama: Netlify ucretsiz planda function toplam suresi ~10 sn (soguk baslangic dahil). Banka probu uzun surerse Chrome HTTP 502 gosterir.
adimlar: 3) Kisa banka probu (varsayilan, ~9 sn icinde JSON): /.netlify/functions/vakif-connectivity-probe
4) Uzun / tam prob: Netlify env VAKIF_CONNECTIVITY_LONG=1 + (tercihen) ucretli plan function timeout 26-60s; sonra ayni URL veya ?full=1
